name: Rocky Road Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. Soften the gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Mix cream cheese, sugar, cocoa, and vanilla together until well blended.
5. Gradually add the gelatin, mixing until blended.
6. Fold in the remaining ingredients; pour over the crust.
7. Chill until firm.
